samples.xml_description:
<module id="multi_pipe_8bit">
    <description>Unsigned 8-bit multiplier implemented using a pipelined structure. This module takes two 8-bit inputs, 'mul_a' and 'mul_b', and produces a 16-bit output 'mul_out'. The multiplication process is divided into stages, each represented by a task. The tasks include input control, input register, partial product generation, partial sum calculation, and final product calculation. Each task has its own implementation details, including sequential logic and combinational logic. The output is generated based on the output enable signal 'mul_en_out'.
</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal for synchronization.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Active-low reset signal for initialization.</input>
        <input id="mul_en_in">Input enable signal for starting the multiplication process.</input>
        <output id="mul_en_out">Output enable signal indicating the completion of the multiplication process.</output>
        <input id="mul_a" width_description="[7:0]">Multiplicand input signal.</input>
        <input id="mul_b" width_description="[7:0]">Multiplier input signal.</input>
        <output id="mul_out" width_description="[15:0]">Product output signal.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <state id="IDLE">State for idle mode.</state>
        <state id="INPUT_CONTROL">State for input control.</state>
        <state id="INPUT_REGISTER">State for input registration.</state>
        <state id="PARTIAL_PRODUCT_GEN">State for generating partial products.</state>
        <state id="PARTIAL_SUM_CALC">State for calculating partial sums.</state>
        <state id="FINAL_PRODUCT_CALC">State for calculating the final product.</state>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description type="combinational_logic">
        <assign id="mul_en_out">The output enable signal is determined by the last stage's output enable signal.</assign>
    </logic_description>
    <logic_description type="sequential_logic">
        <always id="input_control_task" posedge_clk="true" negedge_rst_n="true">
            <if id="input_control_if" condition="mul_en_in">
                <assign id="mul_en_out_reg[0]" value="1'b1"/>
            </if>
            <else id="input_control_else">
                <assign id="mul_en_out_reg[0]" value="1'b0"/>
            </else>
        </always>
        <always id="input_register_task" posedge_clk="true" negedge_rst_n="true">
            <if id="input_register_if" condition="mul_en_in">
                <assign id="mul_a_reg" value="mul_a"/>
                <assign id="mul_b_reg" value="mul_b"/>
            </if>
        </always>
        <always id="partial_product_gen_task" posedge_clk="true" negedge_rst_n="true">
            <if id="partial_product_gen_if" condition="mul_en_in">
                <assign id="temp[0][0]" value="mul_a_reg[0]&mul_b_reg[0]"/>
                <assign id="temp[1][0]" value="mul_a_reg[1]&mul_b_reg[0]"/>
                <assign id="temp[2][0]" value="mul_a_reg[2]&mul_b_reg[0]"/>
                <assign id="temp[3][0]" value="mul_a_reg[3]&mul_b_reg[0]"/>
                <assign id="temp[4][0]" value="mul_a_reg[4]&mul_b_reg[0]"/>
                <assign id="temp[5][0]" value="mul_a_reg[5]&mul_b_reg[0]"/>
                <assign id="temp[6][0]" value="mul_a_reg[6]&mul_b_reg[0]"/>
                <assign id="temp[7][0]" value="mul_a_reg[7]&mul_b_reg[0]"/>
                <assign id="temp[0][1]" value="mul_a_reg[0]&mul_b_reg[1]"/>
                <assign id="temp[1][1]" value="mul_a_reg[1]&mul_b_reg[1]"/>
                <assign id="temp[2][1]" value="mul_a_reg[2]&mul_b_reg[1]"/>
                <assign id="temp[3][1]" value="mul_a_reg[3]&mul_b_reg[1]"/>
                <assign id="temp[4][1]" value="mul_a_reg[4]&mul_b_reg[1]"/>
                <assign id="temp[5][1]" value="mul_a_reg[5]&mul_b_reg[1]"/>
                <assign id="temp[6][1]" value="mul_a_reg[6]&mul_b_reg[1]"/>
                <assign id="temp[7][1]" value="mul_a_reg[7]&mul_b_reg[1]"/>
                <assign id="temp[0][2]" value="mul_a_reg[0]&mul_b_reg[2]"/>
                <assign id="temp[1][2]" value="mul_a_reg[1]&mul_b_reg[2]"/>
                <assign id="temp[2][2]" value="mul_a_reg[2]&mul_b_reg[2]"/>
                <assign id="temp[3][2]" value="mul_a_reg[3]&mul_b_reg[2]"/>
                <assign id="temp[4][2]" value="mul_a_reg[4]&mul_b_reg[2]"/>
                <assign id="temp[5][2]" value="mul_a_reg[5]&mul_b_reg[2]"/>
                <assign id="temp[6][2]" value="mul_a_reg[6]&mul_b_reg[2]"/>
                <assign id="temp[7][2]" value="mul_a_reg[7]&mul_b_reg[2]"/>
                <assign id="temp[0][3]" value="mul_a_reg[0]&mul_b_reg[3]"/>
                <assign id="temp[1][3]" value="mul_a_reg[1]&mul_b_reg[3]"/>
                <assign id="temp[2][3]" value="mul_a_reg[2]&mul_b_reg[3]"/>
                <assign id="temp[3][3]" value="mul_a_reg[3]&mul_b_reg[3]"/>
                <assign id="temp[4][3]" value="mul_a_reg[4]&mul_b_reg[3]"/>
                <assign id="temp[5][3]" value="mul_a_reg[5]&mul_b_reg[3]"/>
                <assign id="temp[6][3]" value="mul_a_reg[6]&mul_b_reg[3]"/>
                <assign id="temp[7][3]" value="mul_a_reg[7]&mul_b_reg[3]"/>
                <assign id="temp[0][4]" value="mul_a_reg[0]&mul_b_reg[4]"/>
                <assign id="temp[1][4]" value="mul_a_reg[1]&mul_b_reg[4]"/>
                <assign id="temp[2][4]" value="mul_a_reg[2]&mul_b_reg[4]"/>
                <assign id="temp[3][4]" value="mul_a_reg[3]&mul_b_reg[4]"/>
                <assign id="temp[4][4]" value="mul_a_reg[4]&mul_b_reg[4]"/>
                <assign id="temp[5][4]" value="mul_a_reg[5]&mul_b_reg[4]"/>
                <assign id="temp[6][4]" value="mul_a_reg[6]&mul_b_reg[4]"/>
                <assign id="temp[7][4]" value="mul_a_reg[7]&mul_b_reg[4]"/>
                <assign id="temp[0][5]" value="mul_a_reg[0]&mul_b_reg[5]"/>
                <assign id="temp[1][5]" value="mul_a_reg[1]&mul_b_reg[5]"/>
                <assign id="temp[2][5]" value="mul_a_reg[2]&mul_b_reg[5]"/>
                <assign id="temp[3][5]" value="mul_a_reg[3]&mul_b_reg[5]"/>
                <assign id="temp[4][5]" value="mul_a_reg[4]&mul_b_reg[5]"/>
                <assign id="temp[5][5]" value="mul_a_reg[5]&mul_b_reg[5]"/>
                <assign id="temp[6][5]" value="mul_a_reg[6]&mul_b_reg[5]"/>
                <assign id="temp[7][5]" value="mul_a_reg[7]&mul_b_reg[5]"/>
                <assign id="temp[0][6]" value="mul_a_reg[0]&mul_b_reg[6]"/>
                <assign id="temp[1][6]" value="mul_a_reg[1]&mul_b_reg[6]"/>
                <assign id="temp[2][6]" value="mul_a_reg[2]&mul_b_reg[6]"/>
                <assign id="temp[3][6]" value="mul_a_reg[3]&mul_b_reg[6]"/>
                <assign id="temp[4][6]" value="mul_a_reg[4]&mul_b_reg[6]"/>
                <assign id="temp[5][6]" value="mul_a_reg[5]&mul_b_reg[6]"/>
                <assign id="temp[6][6]" value="mul_a_reg[6]&mul_b_reg[6]"/>
                <assign id="temp[7][6]" value="mul_a_reg[7]&mul_b_reg[6]"/>
                <assign id="temp[0][7]" value="mul_a_reg[0]&mul_b_reg[7]"/>
                <assign id="temp[1][7]" value="mul_a_reg[1]&mul_b_reg[7]"/>
                <assign id="temp[2][7]" value="mul_a_reg[2]&mul_b_reg[7]"/>
                <assign id="temp[3][7]" value="mul_a_reg[3]&mul_b_reg[7]"/>
                <assign id="temp[4][7]" value="mul_a_reg[4]&mul_b_reg[7]"/>
                <assign id="temp[5][7]" value="mul_a_reg[5]&mul_b_reg[7]"/>
                <assign id="temp[6][7]" value="mul_a_reg[6]&mul_b_reg[7]"/>
                <assign id="temp[7][7]" value="mul_a_reg[7]&mul_b_reg[7]"/>
            </if>
        </always>
        <always id="partial_sum_calc_task" posedge_clk="true" negedge_rst_n="true">
            <if id="partial_sum_calc_if" condition="mul_en_in">
                <assign id="sum[0]" value="{9'b0,temp[0]}"/>
                <assign id="sum[1]" value="{8'b0,temp[1],1'b0} + {8'b0,sum[0][7:0]}"/>
                <assign id="sum[2]" value="{7'b0,temp[2],2'b0} + {7'b0,sum[1][7:0]}"/>
                <assign id="sum[3]" value="{6'b0,temp[3],3'b0} + {6'b0,sum[2][7:0]}"/>
                <assign id="sum[4]" value="{5'b0,temp[4],4'b0} + {5'b0,sum[3][7:0]}"/>
                <assign id="sum[5]" value="{4'b0,temp[5],5'b0} + {4'b0,sum[4][7:0]}"/>
                <assign id="sum[6]" value="{3'b0,temp[6],6'b0} + {3'b0,sum[5][7:0]}"/>
                <assign id="sum[7]" value="{2'b0,temp[7],7'b0} + {2'b0,sum[6][7:0]}"/>
            </if>
        </always>
        <always id="final_product_calc_task" posedge_clk="true" negedge_rst_n="true">
            <if id="final_product_calc_if" condition="mul_en_in">
                <assign id="mul_out_reg" value="{sum[7][7:0],sum[6][7:0],sum[5][7:0],sum[4][7:0],sum[3][7:0],sum[2][7:0],sum[1][7:0],sum[0][7:0]}"/>
            </if>
        </always>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
        // Task 1: Input Control
        always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
            if (~rst_n) begin
                mul_en_out_reg <= 0;
            end else begin
                mul_en_out_reg <= {mul_en_out_reg[mul_en_out_reg.length()-2:0], mul_en_in};
            end
        end
        
        // Task 2: Input Register
        always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
            if (~rst_n) begin
                mul_a_reg <= 0;
                mul_b_reg <= 0;
            end else if (mul_en_in) begin
                mul_a_reg <= mul_a;
                mul_b_reg <= mul_b;
            end
        end
        
        // Task 3: Partial Product Generation
        genvar i, j;
        generate
            for (i = 0; i < 8; i = i + 1) begin : pp_gen_loop
                for (j = 0; j < 8; j = j + 1) begin : pp_gen_inner_loop
                    assign temp[i][j] = mul_a_reg[j] & mul_b_reg[i];
                end
            end
        endgenerate
        
        // Task 4: Partial Sum Calculation
        reg [15:0] sum [0:7];
        
        always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
            if (~rst_n) begin
                for (int k = 0; k < 8; k = k + 1) begin
                    sum[k] <= 0;
                end
            end else if (mul_en_in) begin
                sum[0] <= {9'b0, temp[0]};
                sum[1] <= {8'b0, temp[1], 1'b0} + {8'b0, sum[0][7:0]};
                sum[2] <= {7'b0, temp[2], 2'b0} + {7'b0, sum[1][7:0]};
                sum[3] <= {6'b0, temp[3], 3'b0} + {6'b0, sum[2][7:0]};
                sum[4] <= {5'b0, temp[4], 4'b0} + {5'b0, sum[3][7:0]};
                sum[5] <= {4'b0, temp[5], 5'b0} + {4'b0, sum[4][7:0]};
                sum[6] <= {3'b0, temp[6], 6'b0} + {3'b0, sum[5][7:0]};
                sum[7] <= {2'b0, temp[7], 7'b0} + {2'b0, sum[6][7:0]};
            end
        end
        
        // Task 5: Final Product Calculation
        reg [15:0] mul_out_reg;
        
        always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
            if (~rst_n) begin
                mul_out_reg <= 0;
            end else if (mul_en_in) begin
                mul_out_reg <= {sum[7][7:0], sum[6][7:0], sum[5][7:0], sum[4][7:0], sum[3][7:0], sum[2][7:0], sum[1][7:0], sum[0][7:0]};
            end
        end
        
        // Output assignment
        assign mul_out = mul_en_out ? mul_out_reg : 16'd0;
    </implementation>
    
    <task id="input_control_task">
        <description>Task responsible for controlling the input signals during multiplication.</description>
        <inputs>
            <input id="clk">Clock signal for synchronization.</input>
            <input id="rst_n">Active-low reset signal for initialization.</input>
            <input id="mul_en_in">Input enable signal for starting the multiplication process.</input>
        </inputs>
        <outputs>
            <output id="mul_en_out_reg">Register storing the output enable signal for the multiplication process.</output>
        </outputs>
        <implementation>
            <sequential_logic>
                <always id="input_control_always" posedge_clk="true" negedge_rst_n="true">
                    <if id="input_control_if" condition="mul_en_in">
                        <assign id="mul_en_out_reg[0]" value="1'b1"/>
                    </if>
                    <else id="input_control_else">
                        <assign id="mul_en_out_reg[0]" value="1'b0"/>
                    </else>
                </always>
            </sequential_logic>
        </implementation>
    </task>
    
    <task id="input_register_task">
        <description>Task responsible for registering the input operands during multiplication.</description>
        <inputs>
            <input id="clk">Clock signal for synchronization.</input>
            <input id="rst_n">Active-low reset signal for initialization.</input>
            <input id="mul_en_in">Input enable signal for starting the multiplication process.</input>
            <input id="mul_a" width_description="[7:0]">Multiplicand input signal.</input>
            <input id="mul_b" width_description="[7:0]">Multiplier input signal.</input>
        </inputs>
        <outputs>
            <output id="mul_a_reg">Register storing the multiplicand input signal.</output>
            <output id="mul_b_reg">Register storing the multiplier input signal.</output>
        </outputs>
        <implementation>
            <sequential_logic>
                <always id="input_register_always" posedge_clk="true" negedge_rst_n="true">
                    <if id="input_register_if" condition="mul_en_in">
                        <assign id="mul_a_reg" value="mul_a"/>
                        <assign id="mul_b_reg" value="mul_b"/>
                    </if>
                </always>
            </sequential_logic>
        </implementation>
    </task>
    
    <task id="partial_product_gen_task">
        <description>Task responsible for generating partial products during multiplication.</description>
        <inputs>
            <input id="clk">Clock signal for synchronization
